# Haba Field

**Summary**: A field in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia used as a case study for seismic processing.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-toma|Toma, 2011]] applied the hybrid static model to 3D seismic data from Haba Field.
